sensitive-path-guard.name: sensitive-path-guard
sensitive-path-guard.description: Blocks writes to sensitive paths (.env, credentials, keys, etc.)

exit-code-enforcer.name: exit-code-enforcer
exit-code-enforcer.description: Ensures hook scripts use exit code 2 to block (not exit 1)

post-edit-lint.description: Runs linter on files after Claude edits them

ts-check.name: ts-check
ts-check.description: Runs TypeScript type checking after code changes

web-budget-gate.description: Limits web search/fetch calls per session to control costs

cost-tracker.name: cost-tracker
cost-tracker.description: Tracks tool usage costs per session

error-advisor.name: error-advisor
error-advisor.description: Provides contextual fix suggestions when commands fail

security-pack.description: Essential security hooks for Claude Code

cost-pack.description: Cost control and usage tracking hooks

error-pack.name: error-pack
